boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operations operator execute the industrial, utility, or safety-control action now? Focus: emergency verbal instruction.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact source records close boundary for emergency instruction.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE is required when exact current source evidence leaves the packet action boundary open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current written authority and safety checklist match

critical_features_preserved: current written authority and safety checklist match
final_answer: Source records confirm exact boundary closure for emergency verbal instruction. Current authority and safety checklist match. Operator may execute now per controlling control record. No open defects.
